subtitle: Senior Transformation & AI Leader -- Enterprise AI Adoption | Cross-Functional Workflow Redesign | Governance & Change
summary_text: Senior technology and transformation executive with 14 years running enterprise transformation from inside the technology function at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB). Drove an 8-year digital-first, cloud-first, security-first transformation that delivered 200%+ growth in SEO and digital acquisition, full Azure cloud migration, contact center AI transformation with zero service disruption on day-one go-live, and an Enterprise PMO that delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M portfolio. Earlier: 17 years founding and running DMLCo, a web/IT consulting firm with full P&L. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation -- including a structured evaluation methodology adopted by a national CX consulting firm.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions for enterprise environments.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Drove enterprise digital-first, cloud-first, security-first transformation over 8 years; led full Azure cloud migration; sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance.

Led full enterprise contact center AI transformation -- intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, integrated knowledge bots (human-in-the-loop AI throughout) -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live.

Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated cross-functional project governance and delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders.

Owned data function end-to-end -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions under regulatory governance.
Led digital transformation driving 200%+ growth in SEO and digital acquisition; modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints) -- doubled development throughput.
Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients; managed stakeholders across complex organizational structures.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

projects.title: github.com/mknnmknn/about-mknn
projects.desc: Overview of public projects, with access to private repositories on request. Featured project: career-ops-dml -- a private fork of santifer/career-ops, customized into the LLM-assisted pipeline used daily in my job search. Working code extended alongside Claude Code (Node.js, Claude API, Playwright, Go).

Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms, DataRobot (Production ML), AI Governance
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, CI/CD, Cloud Migration
Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, ePMO Governance, Multi-Stakeholder Roadmap, Build-Buy-Partner
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
